data.body: AC amendment (GAP-003 — critical): Specify covered_by_SC output type explicitly. Per story done definitions, the output format is (file_path, matching_line, covered_by_SC: true|false) — covered_by_SC is a boolean. The Part C section must define this explicitly: 'covered_by_SC: true if the consumer is covered by any success criterion, false if not.' Add Verify: grep -q 'true.*false\|false.*true\|boolean\|true/false' to the covered_by_SC acceptance criterion.
